name: construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month tool
description: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient reporting causes project delays. We streamline report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inefficient generation of project status reports

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient generation of project status reports
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For construction project managers processing 5–15 projects/month, inefficient reporting causes project delays. We streamline report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
